summary: Iteration 104: Tested form submission verify/reject/send endpoints and FormRequirementRow UI integration. Fixed bug in compliance file serializer that was including deleted submissions. All 14 backend tests pass. Frontend UI correctly displays form rows with Verify/Reject buttons, RejectFormDialog, and Send to Employee functionality.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed compliance file serializer to exclude deleted submissions (line 28782)
/app/backend/tests/test_form_verify_reject_send.py - New test file for verify/reject/send endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created test form submissions for interview_record and recruitment_checklist
context_for_next_testing_agent: Form submission verify/reject/send flows fully functional. Backend endpoints: POST /api/form-submissions/{id}/verify, POST /api/form-submissions/{id}/reject, POST /api/employees/{id}/send-form?form_type={type}. Frontend components: FormSubmissionDrawer (create/view/edit modes), RejectFormDialog (rejection with reason), FormRequirementRow (displays status badges, action buttons). Fixed bug where compliance file was including deleted submissions.

backend_verify_endpoint.details: POST /api/form-submissions/{id}/verify sets status to verified, verified_by, verified_at

backend_reject_endpoint.details: POST /api/form-submissions/{id}/reject sets status to rejected with rejection_reason, rejected_by, rejected_at

backend_send_form_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/send-form?form_type={type} creates email request and sends form link

compliance_file_rejected_status.details: Compliance file returns status='rejected' with rejection_reason for rejected submissions

compliance_file_verified_status.details: Compliance file returns status='verified' for verified submissions

compliance_file_awaiting_review_status.details: Compliance file returns status='awaiting_review' for submitted forms

frontend_form_row_rejected_display.details: FormRequirementRow shows red Rejected badge and rejection reason in red box

frontend_form_row_verified_display.details: FormRequirementRow shows green Verified badge with checkmark icon

frontend_form_row_awaiting_review_displa.details: FormRequirementRow shows amber Awaiting Review badge with Verify/Reject buttons

frontend_fill_form_button.details: Clicking Fill Form opens FormSubmissionDrawer in create mode

frontend_view_button.details: View button available for submitted forms

frontend_verify_button.details: Clicking Verify triggers API call and updates status to Verified

frontend_reject_dialog.details: RejectFormDialog shows rejection reason textarea and Reject Submission button

frontend_send_button.details: Clicking Send to Employee triggers send-form API call and shows success toast

bug_fixed.issue: Compliance file was including deleted form submissions
bug_fixed.fix: Changed query to $nin: ['superseded', 'deleted'] in server.py line 28782
bug_fixed.verification: All 14 backend tests pass after fix
